name: Base64 Encoder / Decoder
description: Encode text to Base64 or decode Base64 back to text. Essential developer tool for data encoding.
keywords: base64 encoder, base64 decoder, encode to base64, decode base64, base64 converter, text to base64
howToUse: 1. Paste text 2. Choose Encode or Decode 3. Result appears instantly 4. Copy output
faq: Q: What is Base64? A: Binary-to-text encoding. Q: Is it encryption? A: No, just encoding.
